message: 🆘 रेलवे स्टेशन के पास बड़ा हादसा! सफदरजंग में 5 यूनिट O- खून तुरंत चाहिए। कई लोग घायल हैं। कृपया जल्दी आएं 9988776655
message_english: 🆘 Major accident near the railway station! 5 units O- blood needed immediately at Safdarjung. Many are injured. Please come fast 9988776655

message: फैक्ट्री में धमाका हुआ है। KEM मुंबई में 4 यूनिट AB+ ब्लड अभी चाहिए। मरीज बुरी तरह जल गया है और हालत गंभीर है।
message_english: Blast in a factory. 4 units AB+ blood needed right now at KEM Mumbai. The patient is severely burnt and condition is critical.

message: एम्स दिल्ली में प्रसूति के बाद एक महिला का बहुत खून बह गया है। माँ की जान खतरे में है। 2 यूनिट A+ तुरंत चाहिए!
message_english: A woman has lost a lot of blood postpartum at AIIMS Delhi. The mother's life is in danger. 2 units A+ needed immediately!

message: अपोलो चेन्नई में गोली लगने से घायल व्यक्ति के लिए 3 यूनिट B- खून की इमरजेंसी है। डोनर कृपया जल्द से जल्द अस्पताल पहुंचे।
message_english: There is an emergency for 3 units B- blood for a gunshot victim at Apollo Chennai. Donor please reach the hospital as soon as possible.

message: मैक्स अस्पताल में ब्लड कैंसर के मरीज को भयंकर ब्लीडिंग हो रही है। 2 यूनिट A- ब्लड तुरंत चाहिए। संपर्क करें 8888800000
message_english: A blood cancer patient is bleeding terribly at Max hospital. 2 units A- blood needed immediately. Contact 8888800000

message: मेदांता में भीषण कार एक्सीडेंट का केस आया है। 5 यूनिट O+ खून की सख्त जरूरत है। मरीज आईसीयू में है, कृपया मदद करें।
message_english: A severe car accident case has come to Medanta. 5 units O+ blood is strictly needed. Patient is in ICU, please help.

message: नारायणा बैंगलोर में डेंगू से प्लेटलेट्स सिर्फ 9 हजार रह गए हैं। 2 यूनिट B+ ब्लड जल्द चाहिए। 7777777777 पर बात करें।
message_english: Platelets have dropped to just 9 thousand due to dengue at Narayana Bangalore. 2 units B+ blood needed soon. Talk on 7777777777.

message: सर गंगा राम अस्पताल में लिवर ट्रांसप्लांट के बीच 1 यूनिट AB- ब्लड की जरूरत है। आज शाम तक डोनर की आवश्यकता है।
message_english: 1 unit AB- blood is needed during a liver transplant at Sir Ganga Ram hospital. Donor is required by this evening.

message: लीलावती मुंबई में मलेरिया से हीमोग्लोबिन 4 हो गया है। 3 यूनिट O+ ब्लड कल सुबह तक चाहिए। कृपया आगे आएं।
message_english: Hemoglobin has become 4 due to malaria at Lilavati Mumbai. 3 units O+ blood needed by tomorrow morning. Please come forward.

message: पीजीआईएमईआर चंडीगढ़ में पेट में अल्सर फटने से ब्लीडिंग हो रही है। 2 यूनिट A+ ब्लड की कल तक आवश्यकता है।
message_english: Bleeding is happening due to a ruptured stomach ulcer at PGIMER Chandigarh. 2 units A+ blood is required by tomorrow.

message: CMC वेल्लोर में डायलिसिस के दौरान अचानक 1 यूनिट B- ब्लड चाहिए। कृपया जो भी आसपास हो अस्पताल पहुंचे।
message_english: 1 unit B- blood is suddenly needed during dialysis at CMC Vellore. Whoever is nearby please reach the hospital.

message: KIMS हैदराबाद में हार्ट वाल्व रिप्लेसमेंट के लिए 2 यूनिट O- खून आज रात तक अरेंज करना है। कोई मदद कर सकता है?
message_english: Need to arrange 2 units O- blood for heart valve replacement at KIMS Hyderabad by tonight. Can anyone help?

message: एम्स दिल्ली में अगले हफ्ते मेरे पिता की कूल्हे की सर्जरी है। 2 यूनिट B+ ब्लड बैंक में जमा करना है। कृपया मैसेज करें।
message_english: My father has hip surgery next week at AIIMS Delhi. 2 units B+ blood needs to be deposited in the blood bank. Please message.

message: सफदरजंग में थैलेसीमिया पीड़ित बच्चे को इस गुरुवार 1 यूनिट A+ खून चढ़ना है। कोई डोनर हो तो कृपया बताएं।
message_english: A child suffering from thalassemia is to receive 1 unit A+ blood this Thursday at Safdarjung. If there is a donor, please let us know.

message: अपोलो चेन्नई में सिस्ट निकालने का ऑपरेशन निर्धारित है। 1 यूनिट O+ ब्लड की व्यवस्था करनी है। डोनर्स संपर्क करें।
message_english: Cyst removal operation is scheduled at Apollo Chennai. Need to arrange 1 unit O+ blood. Donors please contact.

message: मेदांता में कीमोथेरेपी से पहले 1 यूनिट AB+ ब्लड की जरूरत है। अगले बुधवार तक जमा करवाना है।
message_english: 1 unit AB+ blood is needed before chemotherapy at Medanta. Have to deposit it by next Wednesday.

message: इस रविवार को लायंस क्लब द्वारा जयपुर में रक्तदान शिविर है। सभी रक्तदाताओं से निवेदन है कि आएं और रक्तदान करें।
message_english: This Sunday there is a blood donation camp by Lions Club in Jaipur. All blood donors are requested to come and donate blood.

message: मेरी बेटी को A- रक्त देने वाले अज्ञात डोनर का बहुत-बहुत आभार। भगवान आपका भला करे, वह अब ठीक है।
message_english: A huge thanks to the unknown donor who gave A- blood to my daughter. God bless you, she is fine now.

message: क्या दांत निकलवाने के तुरंत बाद हम रक्तदान कर सकते हैं? कृपया कोई डॉक्टर या विशेषज्ञ इस बारे में बताएं।
message_english: Can we donate blood immediately after a tooth extraction? Please some doctor or expert tell about this.

message: रक्तदान महादान है। हर 3 महीने में खून देकर आप किसी की दुनिया बचा सकते हैं। जागरूक बनें और लोगों को प्रेरित करें।
message_english: Blood donation is the greatest donation. By giving blood every 3 months you can save someone's world. Be aware and inspire people.

message: Bhaiyo express way pe bus palat gayi hai. Fortis Gurgaon me 5 unit O- URGENTLY chahiye. 🆘 9812345678
message_english: Brothers, a bus has overturned on the expressway. 5 units O- URGENTLY needed at Fortis Gurgaon. 🆘 9812345678

message: Max Saket me newborn baby ka severe jaundice hai. Blood exchange ke liye 1 unit AB+ abhi ke abhi chahiye!
message_english: Severe jaundice for a newborn baby at Max Saket. 1 unit AB+ is needed right now for a blood exchange!

message: Snake bite ki wajah se KIMS Hyderabad me DIC ho gaya hai. 3 unit A- blood immediately required hai. Pls bhago!
message_english: DIC has happened due to snake bite at KIMS Hyderabad. 3 units A- blood is immediately required. Pls rush!

message: Construction site se majdoor gir gaya hai. Lilavati Mumbai me 4 unit B- blood chahiye turant. Help guys 9999900000
message_english: A laborer has fallen from a construction site. 4 units B- blood needed immediately at Lilavati Mumbai. Help guys 9999900000

message: CMC Vellore me extreme poisoning ka case hai. Wash ke liye 2 unit O+ blood ekdum urgent chahiye.
message_english: Extreme poisoning case at CMC Vellore. 2 units O+ blood is absolutely urgently needed for a wash.

message: Safdarjung Delhi me stabbing victim ko laya gaya hai. Khoon bohot beh chuka hai, 3 unit A+ blood fast!!
message_english: A stabbing victim has been brought to Safdarjung Delhi. A lot of blood has been lost, 3 units A+ blood fast!!

message: Apollo Chennai me ruptured ectopic pregnancy. Maa ki jaan bachani hai, 2 unit B+ abhi chahiye blood bank me.
message_english: Ruptured ectopic pregnancy at Apollo Chennai. Have to save the mother's life, 2 units B+ needed right now in the blood bank.

message: Cardiac arrest in emergency ward at Narayana Bangalore! 2 unit AB- blood chahiye CPR ke baad. Call 8888000011
message_english: Cardiac arrest in emergency ward at Narayana Bangalore! 2 units AB- blood needed after CPR. Call 8888000011

message: Cylinder blast victim in PGIMER Chandigarh. 4 unit O- blood needed in next 15 mins. Please RT!
message_english: Cylinder blast victim in PGIMER Chandigarh. 4 units O- blood needed in next 15 mins. Please RT!

message: AIIMS Delhi me dengue fever severe ho gaya hai. 2 unit A+ blood chahiye by tonight. Drop a text agar aa sakte ho.
message_english: Dengue fever has become severe at AIIMS Delhi. 2 units A+ blood needed by tonight. Drop a text if you can come.

message: KEM Mumbai me extreme anemia se hb 3.5 aa gaya. 3 unit O+ blood chahiye kal subah tak. 9123491234
message_english: Hb has dropped to 3.5 due to extreme anemia at KEM Mumbai. 3 units O+ blood needed by tomorrow morning. 9123491234

message: Medanta me chemo ke karan count nil hai. 1 unit B- blood required hai kal tak. Rare group hai pls help.
message_english: Count is nil due to chemo at Medanta. 1 unit B- blood is required by tomorrow. It's a rare group pls help.

message: Sir Ganga Ram Delhi me bleeding ulcer ka case. 2 unit AB+ blood reserve me rakhna hai aaj raat. Koi bata do.
message_english: Bleeding ulcer case at Sir Ganga Ram Delhi. Need to keep 2 units AB+ blood in reserve tonight. Someone let me know.

message: Fortis Gurgaon me transplant rejection hua hai. 2 unit O- blood ka prabandh karna hai jaldi se kal tak.
message_english: Transplant rejection has occurred at Fortis Gurgaon. Have to arrange 2 units O- blood quickly by tomorrow.

message: KIMS Hyderabad me dialysis me complication. 1 unit A- blood ki zaroorat hai. Koi pass me ho toh batao.
message_english: Complication in dialysis at KIMS Hyderabad. 1 unit A- blood is needed. Tell me if anyone is nearby.

message: Lilavati Mumbai me brain tumor surgery ke dauran 2 unit B+ blood aur chahiye hoga kal dopehar tak.
message_english: 2 more units B+ blood will be needed during brain tumor surgery at Lilavati Mumbai by tomorrow afternoon.

message: Safdarjung me malaria patient admitted hai. 1 unit AB- blood chahiye kal tak. Please share kardo groups me.
message_english: Malaria patient is admitted at Safdarjung. 1 unit AB- blood needed by tomorrow. Please share in the groups.

message: Max Saket me accident patient ki next surgery kal hai. 2 unit O+ blood chahiye hospital me. Call 7777766666
message_english: The next surgery of an accident patient is tomorrow at Max Saket. 2 units O+ blood needed in the hospital. Call 7777766666

message: Apollo Chennai me chacha ji ki planned spine surgery hai Friday ko. 2 unit A+ deposit karna hai blood bank me.
message_english: Uncle's planned spine surgery is on Friday at Apollo Chennai. Need to deposit 2 units A+ in the blood bank.

message: Routine thalassemia transfusion hona hai Narayana Bangalore me is week. 1 unit B+ blood chahiye hoga.
message_english: Routine thalassemia transfusion is to happen at Narayana Bangalore this week. 1 unit B+ blood will be needed.

message: Medanta Gurgaon me next week knee replacement ke liye 1 unit O- blood arrange karna hai. Call 9811122233
message_english: Have to arrange 1 unit O- blood for knee replacement next week at Medanta Gurgaon. Call 9811122233

message: Planned c-section hai PGIMER Chandigarh me 4 din baad. Doctor ne 1 unit AB+ ready rakhne bola hai just in case.
message_english: Planned c-section is there at PGIMER Chandigarh after 4 days. Doctor has asked to keep 1 unit AB+ ready just in case.

message: KEM Mumbai me hernia operation ke liye 1 unit A- blood dena padega hospital me replacement pe parso.
message_english: For hernia operation at KEM Mumbai, 1 unit A- blood will have to be given in the hospital on replacement day after tomorrow.

message: Elective gall bladder surgery hai AIIMS Delhi me. Blood bank ne 1 unit O+ secure karne ko bola hai.
message_english: Elective gall bladder surgery is at AIIMS Delhi. The blood bank has asked to secure 1 unit O+.

message: Delhi NCR walo, is sunday Noida DLF mall me mega blood camp hai. Movie tickets milengi donors ko. Jarur aao.
message_english: Delhi NCR folks, there is a mega blood camp at Noida DLF mall this Sunday. Donors will get movie tickets. Must come.

message: Jisne bhi mere brother ke liye kal night me B- diya unko Thank You! Wo ab stable hain ICU me.
message_english: Thank You to whoever gave B- for my brother last night! He is stable in ICU now.

message: Antibiotics course khatam hone ke kitne din baad blood donate kar sakte hain? Mujhe donation karna hai kal camp me.
message_english: How many days after finishing an antibiotics course can one donate blood? I have to donate at the camp tomorrow.

message: Bangalore me NGOs ka koi contact list hai jo emergency me blood arrange karte hain? Ek PDF banani hai for help.
message_english: Is there any contact list of NGOs in Bangalore that arrange blood in emergency? Have to make a PDF for help.

message: Youth ko awareness phailani chahiye! Har 3 mahine me blood donate karo. Chennai dosto ko forward karo aur save lives.
message_english: Youth should spread awareness! Donate blood every 3 months. Forward to Chennai friends and save lives.

message: Humari IT company Pune me Friday ko corporate blood drive organise kar rahi hai. Apne dosto ko zarur le aao office.
message_english: Our IT company is organizing a corporate blood drive in Pune on Friday. Definitely bring your friends to the office.
